summary: Show or Create Document Markup Downloadable PDF
description:
Find or Create Document Markup Downloadable PDF. Starts processing to create a downloadable PDF with markup. When completed, the same request will include a download URL for the PDF.
item_id, item_type, and attachment_id paramters are the same parameters included in the URL when viewing the attachment in procore.
Example: app.procore.com/161072/project/submittal_logs/document_viewer?attachment_id=43&item_id=42&item_type=SubmittalLog&project_id=161072

200.description: Document Markup Downloadable PDF completed and download URL is included in the response.

202.description: Document Markup Downloadable PDF job has been created and is processing.

403.description: User does not have permission to view Document Markup Downloadable PDF

404.description: Document Markup Downloadable PDF not found

422.description: Error updating Document Markup Downloadable PDF

item_id.description: The ID of the parent item this document belongs to

item_type.description: The type of the parent item this document belongs to (eg SubmittalLog)
